templateVariables.valueProp: turn account notes into prioritized follow-up drafts
templateVariables.companyContext: B2B SaaS team with 900 active customer accounts

mustNotContain: I hope this finds you well

templateVariables.previousTopic: cleaning duplicate CRM records before outbound campaigns
templateVariables.reasonToReply: their reps are losing time fixing list quality instead of talking to buyers

templateVariables.replyText: This looks useful. Send pricing and a short implementation plan, and I can review it with our RevOps lead next week.

templateVariables.rewriteGoal: Sound more decisive while staying collaborative.
templateVariables.replyText: I can probably look at this later if you send over some details and maybe a few times.

input: Write one concise outbound email section for a productized AI email assistant. Section goal: explain that it drafts first-pass follow-ups from CRM context. Audience: VP Revenue Operations. Constraints: no greeting, no subject line, no markdown, no more than 90 words.
system: You write short B2B email body sections. Return only the requested section text.

mustNotContain: I hope this finds you well
